description: A deterministic arbitration system for resolving priority conflicts between machine tasks.

task_queue.description: List of pending tasks with metadata.

agent_load.description: Current load or capacity of the agent.

priority_rules.description: Rules defining how priority is calculated.

workflow.action: Agent evaluates all tasks based on metadata and priority rules.
Each task receives a deterministic priority score.
Highest scoring task is selected for execution.
Protocol returns the selected task and arbitration reasoning.
